name: context-engineering
description: Context engineering and harness engineering skills for production-grade AI agent systems: fundamentals, degradation patterns, compression, optimization, latent briefing (KV cache sharing between agents), multi-agent coordination, memory systems, tool design, evaluation, autonomous harnesses, self-improvement loops (RSI, meta-harnesses, evolutionary scaffold search), and a file-based researcher operating system with deterministic gates, a continuous loop, and measured router-benchmark results across four frontier models.
